narrative:
Yellow Creek Twp township has 1,297 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a modest Republican lean of 4.2 percentage points.
